relationships.evidence: Social Intelligence: We evaluate models on emotionally and socially grounded reasoning using EmoBench (Sabour et al., 2024) and ToMBench (Chen et al., 2024), which test emotion recognition, social action prediction, and theory-of-mind reasoning. (Section 5)
